params.SpellDescription: Add X mana in any combination of {U} and/or {R}, where X is CARDNAME's power. Activate only during your turn and only once each turn.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add X mana in any combination of {U} and/or {R}, where X is CARDNAME's power. Activate only during your turn and only once each turn.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME and it deals 1 damage to each opponent.
